name: User story
about: Creation of a User Story

---

## Summary / Description
Provide a short, clear description of the problem or task. Explain why this work is needed and any relevant context or links to design documents.

## Type / Category
- [ ] task
- [ ] bug
- [ ] docs
- [ ] infra
- [ ] spike / research

## Dependencies
### Blocked by
- [ ] # (link to issue this depends on)

### Sub-issues
- [ ] # (link to child issue 1)
- [ ] # (link to child issue 2)

## Tasks
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## Acceptance Criteria (AC)
List concrete, testable criteria that must be true for this issue to be accepted.
- [ ] AC 1
- [ ] AC 2

## Definition of Done (DoD)
Checklist describing repository/process conditions for merging (docs updated, tests added, CI green, etc.).
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] CI checks pass
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## How to validate / Test steps
Describe steps a reviewer or tester can follow to validate this work (commands, inputs, expected outputs, screenshots).
